sentences.arabic: لَيَالِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ الْمُبَارَكِ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ مَوَاسِمِ الطَّاعَةِ وَالتَّقَرُّبِ إِلَى اللهِ تَعَالَى، وَقَدْ بَيَّنَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَضْلَهَا فِي أَحَادِيثَ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Noći blagoslovljenog mjeseca ramazana su u najvećim sezonama pokornosti i približavanja Allahu, dželle šanuhu, a Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, pojašnjava njihove vrline u brojnim hadisima.
sentences.translationEn: The nights of the blessed month of Ramadan are among the greatest seasons of worship and drawing close to Allah, and the Prophet, peace be upon him, explained their merit in many hadiths.

sentences.arabic: فَمِنْ ذَلِكَ مَا رَوَاهُ أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ: «مَنْ قَامَ رَمَضَانَ إِيمَانًا وَاحْتِسَابًا غُفِرَ لَهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَنْبِهِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْإِيمَانِ].
sentences.translation: Ebu Hurejre, radijallahu anhu, prenosi da je Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao: 'Ko provede noći ramazana u ibadetu s vjerom i nadajući se nagradi, bit će mu oprošteno što je prethodno od grijeha počinio.'
sentences.translationEn: Abu Hurairah, may Allah be pleased with him, reported that the Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Whoever stands in prayer during Ramadan out of faith and seeking reward will have his past sins forgiven.'

sentences.arabic: وَيَشْمَلُ الْقِيَامُ صَلَاةَ التَّرَاوِيحِ وَتِلَاوَةَ الْقُرْآنِ وَالدُّعَاءَ فِي جَوْفِ اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: [Bilježi ga Buhari u Knjizi imana.] Ovaj noćni ibadet obuhvata teravijsku molitvu, učenje Kur'ana i dovu u dubini noći.
sentences.translationEn: [Recorded by al-Bukhari in the Book of Faith.] This night worship encompasses tarawih prayer, Quranic recitation, and supplication in the depths of the night.

sentences.arabic: وَلَيَالِي الْعَشْرِ الْأَوَاخِرِ مِنْ رَمَضَانَ تَتَضَاعَفُ فِيهَا الطَّاعَاتُ، إِذْ فِيهَا لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ الَّتِي هِيَ خَيْرٌ مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ.
sentences.translation: U posljednjih deset noći ramazana ibadet se umnogostručava, jer u njima je Lejletu-l-kadr, koja je bolja od hiljadu mjeseci.
sentences.translationEn: In the last ten nights of Ramadan acts of worship are multiplied, for within them is Laylat al-Qadr, which is better than a thousand months.

sentences.arabic: وَكَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَعْتَكِفُ فِي هَذِهِ الْعَشْرِ وَيَجْتَهِدُ فِيهَا اجْتِهَادًا لَا يَجْتَهِدُهُ فِي غَيْرِهَا.
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, boravio je u itikafu u tih deset dana i trudio se u ibadetu onako kako se nije trudio u drugim vremenima.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, would perform i'tikaf during these ten nights and exert himself in worship as he did at no other time.

sentences.arabic: وَهَذَا يُعَلِّمُنَا أَنَّ مِنَ الْحِكْمَةِ اسْتِغْلَالَ مَوَاسِمِ الْخَيْرِ وَعَدَمَ إِضَاعَتِهَا فِي اللَّهْوِ وَالْغَفْلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo nas uči da je mudrost iskoristiti prilike za dobro i ne provoditi ih u zabavi i nemaru.
sentences.translationEn: This teaches us that wisdom lies in seizing seasons of goodness and not wasting them in distraction and heedlessness.
